nodes.label: Oh My Claudecode Map
nodes.content:
# Oh My Claudecode

This map summarizes repository structure and important exploration paths. Start with subsystem nodes and follow evidence-backed links to inspect source files.

## Domain Clusters
- Explore [[dist-hooks]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[dist-tests]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[dist-team]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[dist-features]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[src-hooks]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[dist-tools]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[dist-hud]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[src-tests]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[dist-notifications]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[dist-cli]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[dist-mcp]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[src-team]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[dist-agents]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[src-features]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[dist-lib]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.
- Explore [[dist-utils]] to inspect related module behavior and evidence anchors.

## Explorations Needed
- Which subsystems should be prioritized for onboarding documentation?
- Which dependencies are high-risk and need version guardrails?
- Where should integration tests be expanded based on current topology?
